created_at.description:
When the dataset was created.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

modified_at.description:
When the dataset was modified.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

app_id.description: The app the dataset belongs to.

user_id.description: The user the dataset belongs to.

metadata.title:
To handle arbitrary json metadata you can use a struct field:
https://github.com/google/protobuf/blob/master/src/google/protobuf/struct.proto

visibility.description:
The visibility field represents whether this message is privately/publicly visible.
To be visible to the public the App that contains it AND the User that contains the App must
also be publicly visible.

default_annotation_filter.description: Default annotation filter used for this dataset.

default_processing_info.description: Default processing info used for this dataset.

notes.description:
Notes for the dataset
This field should be used for in-depth notes and supports up to 64Kbs.

version.description:
Dataset version associated with this dataset. This is used in listing Datasets
and including the latest version.

is_starred.description: Whether the dataset is starred by the requesting user.

star_count.description: Number of users that starred this dataset.

bookmark_origin.description:
bookmark info. When set, this dataset is a bookmarked dataset of this app.
Info in this field will allow you to find/access original dataset.
